message:
test(frankenterm-core): add 28 VT conformance fixtures covering edge cases

C0 controls (form feed, vertical tab, CR-only), SGR selective resets
(22/23/24/25/27/28/29/55, SGR 39/49 default color reset), scroll region
interactions (RI mid-region, IL at top, DL at bottom, NEL at bottom),
IRM + wide chars, DECOM CUP clamping, EL/ED boundary cases, ECH overflow,
REP with attributes, CNL/CPL with counts, LNM newline-as-CR, soft reset
pending wrap, pending wrap + EL interaction, DECALN cursor reset.

Total VT conformance fixtures: 204

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+{
+  "name": "cr_without_lf",
+  "description": "Carriage return alone moves cursor to column 0, overwriting subsequent chars",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "48454c4c4f0d5859",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 2
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "X"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "Y"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "L"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "L"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 4,
+        "char": "O"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{
+  "name": "form_feed_as_lf",
+  "description": "Form feed (0x0C) behaves as line feed - moves cursor down one line",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    5

+  "input_bytes_hex": "41420c4344",
+  "expected": {

+      "col": 4

+    "cells": [

+      },
+      {

+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "B"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 1,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "C"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 1,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "D"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

+        "char": "B"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}
